summary: Comprehensive dual-contract forensic legal analysis of (1) the Los Romeros Limited Option to Buy Contract (Jan 2026) and (2) the Wincham Agreement (Feb 2026), cross-referenced against all workspace research including the Comprehensive Forensic Audit, Regulatory Compliance Investigation, ITP False Advertising Report, and all known Wincham scheme illegalities. Identifies 14 specific legal irregularities and red flags across both documents with statutory references and recommended actions.
